GDWBS

2024/28

HAWB9597711
No and Type of package:
1 Package
Gross Mass:
7.0 Freight 0.0
Insuranc 0.0

Description of Goods Customs Value $EC Tariff No. Weight (kg) Supplementary
I, the undersigned, REGINA DECOTEAU (FREIGHT 15.00 US) do hereby declare that the above particulars are true and correct.
Dated this day of 20
Signed:
